description: Reuse the original HANDS global object as the zero-slot noun carrier for FIT while preserving normal hand behavior.

replacements.old:
<OBJECT HANDS
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM PAIR HANDS HAND)
	(ADJECTIVE BARE)
	(DESC "pair of hands")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT TOOLBIT)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT HANDS
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM PAIR HANDS HAND FIT)
	(ADJECTIVE BARE)
	(DESC "pair of hands")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT TOOLBIT)
	(ACTION ABS-HANDS-F)>
